summary:
The issue was that Nginx was configured to proxy API requests to port `5001` instead of the actual Flask service port `5000`. I updated `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default`:

```nginx
location /api/ {
    proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;
    ...
}
```

After reloading Nginx and running `test.sh`, **all tests passed.**

**Summary:**  
- The "needle" was the incorrect port in the Nginx config: `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;`
- Fixed by pointing it to `5000`, matching what Flask runs on.

✅ The bug is fixed!
